executives.name: Gillian Doran
executives.background: Gillian Doran joined AngloGold Ashanti as Chief Financial Officer in January 2023. She previously served as CFO of Rio Tinto Aluminium and has extensive experience in the mining and metals industry.

executives.name: Harry Kenyon-Slaney
executives.background: Harry Kenyon-Slaney was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 16 January 2019. He has over 37 years of experience in the mining industry, notably with Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Peter Toth
executives.background: Mr. Toth has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy and Sustainability Officer since July 2022. He joined Newmont from Rio Tinto where he held various senior leadership roles.

executives.name: Chris Salisbury
executives.background: Mr. Salisbury is a highly experienced mining executive with over 30 years' experience across senior operational and strategic leadership roles. He was previously Chief Executive of Rio Tinto Iron Ore.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive - Copper & Coal Product Group

executives.name: David Constable
executives.background: Mr. Constable has served as Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Fluor since January 2021. He previously served as Chief Executive Officer of Sasol Ltd from 2011 to 2016. He was also a director of ABB Ltd and Rio Tinto.

tenure_dates.title: Non-executive Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Jakob Stausholm
executives.background: Jakob joined Rio Tinto in 2018 as Chief Financial Officer and became Chief Executive in January 2021. He has over 20 years of experience in senior finance and strategy roles at Shell and Maersk.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer (formerly Executive Director and CFO)

executives.name: Phil Mitchell
executives.background: Mr Mitchell has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Rio Tinto and Anglo American. He has extensive experience in project development, operations, and corporate strategy.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Business Development and Strategy; CFO of Rio Tinto Iron Ore

executives.name: Thomas Palmer
executives.background: Mr. Palmer has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since October 2019 and as President since June 2019. Previously, he served as First Vice President and Chief Operating Officer from 2016 to 2019 and Senior Vice President, Asia Pacific from 2015 to 2016.

executives.name: Tom Albanese
executives.background: Former CEO of Rio Tinto and Vedanta Resources. He has extensive global mining experience.

board_of_directors.name: Dominic Barton
board_of_directors.background: Dominic was appointed Chairman in 2022. He was previously the Global Managing Partner of McKinsey & Company and served as Canada's Ambassador to China.

board_of_directors.name: Jakob Stausholm
board_of_directors.background: Jakob joined Rio Tinto in 2018 as Chief Financial Officer and became Chief Executive in January 2021. He has over 20 years of experience in senior finance and strategy roles at Shell and Maersk.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer (formerly Executive Director and CFO)
